metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace

properties.displayName: Suspicious PowerShell Script Block Execution
properties.description: Detects execution of suspicious or obfuscated PowerShell commands, such as AMSI bypasses or encoded payloads, using either Sysmon or PowerShell Operational Logs.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "FromBase64String" or CommandLine|contains has "amsi" or CommandLine|contains has "IEX" or CommandLine|contains has "Invoke-Obfuscation" or CommandLine|contains has "DownloadString") and Channel == "Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" and (Message|contains has "FromBase64String" or Message|contains has "amsi" or Message|contains has "IEX" or Message|contains has "Invoke-Obfuscation" or Message|contains has "DownloadString")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Managed code PInvoke or runtime interop usage detected')]

properties.displayName: Managed code PInvoke or runtime interop usage detected
properties.description: Detect managed (.NET) applications or scripts that declare P/Invoke signatures, use Runtime.InteropServices or Marshal methods to call native APIs (indicative of Native API usage).
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "Add-Type" or CommandLine|contains has "System.Runtime.InteropServices" or CommandLine|contains has "PInvoke") and Image endswith "\dotnet.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "DllImport" or CommandLine|contains has "Marshal.")

properties.displayName: WMI Remote Command Execution
properties.description: Detects WMI being used for remote command execution and lateral movement
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/node:" or CommandLine|contains has "process call create" or CommandLine|contains has "/user:" or CommandLine|contains has "/password:" or CommandLine|contains has "Win32_Process") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Invoke-WmiMethod" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or CommandLine|contains has "gwmi" or CommandLine|contains has "Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "Create" or CommandLine|contains has "-ComputerName" or CommandLine|contains has "-Credential") and Image endswith "\wmiprvse.exe" and ParentImage endswith "\svchost.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "cmd.exe /c" or CommandLine|contains has "powershell.exe -c" or CommandLine|contains has "rundll32.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "regsvr32.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "mshta.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "bitsadmin.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "certutil.exe") and CommandLine matches regex ".*\\\\[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}.*"

properties.displayName: Rundll32 Loading Remote or Non-System DLLs
properties.description: Detects rundll32.exe loading DLLs from non-standard directories, network shares, or remote URLs, which may indicate lateral movement or execution of malicious code.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\rundll32.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "\\\\" or CommandLine|contains has "http://" or CommandLine|contains has "https://" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Users\")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Suspicious WMI-Based Execution Wmiprvse Spawning Scripting Engines')]

properties.displayName: Suspicious WMI-Based Execution Wmiprvse Spawning Scripting Engines
properties.description: Detects suspicious use of WMI where wmiprvse.exe spawns PowerShell, cmd.exe, or other scripting engines.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (EventID == "1" or EventID == "3") and ParentImage endswith "\wmiprvse.exe" and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\mshta.exe" or Image|endswith has "\wscript.exe" or Image|endswith has "\cscript.exe")

properties.displayName: Utility Abuse Regsvr32 Rundll32 etc
properties.description: Detects the execution of legitimate Windows utilities (e.g., regsvr32.exe, rundll32.exe) that may be abused to execute arbitrary code, load malicious DLLs, or bypass security controls.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "regsvr32.exe" and Image endswith "rundll32.exe"

properties.displayName: Suspicious Rundll32 Execution with Unusual Parameters
properties.description: Detects potentially malicious use of rundll32.exe with uncommon parameters or DLL paths that may indicate proxy execution of code.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\rundll32.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "shell32.dll,Control_RunDLL" or CommandLine|contains has "desk.cpl" or CommandLine|contains has "appwiz.cpl")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Office-Initiated Scripting or Execution Chain
properties.description: Detects suspicious parent-child chains such as Office apps spawning script interpreters like powershell.exe, mshta.exe, etc., based on Sysmon Event ID 1.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ParentImage|endswith has "\winword.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\excel.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\outlook.exe") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\mshta.exe" or Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\wscript.exe" or Image|endswith has "\cscript.exe")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'PowerShell Download and Execution from Remote Source')]

properties.displayName: PowerShell Download and Execution from Remote Source
properties.description: Detects PowerShell commands that download and execute scripts or payloads directly from remote URLs or network shares.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Invoke-WebRequest" or CommandLine|contains has "Start-BitsTransfer" or CommandLine|contains has "DownloadString" or CommandLine|contains has "DownloadFile" or CommandLine|contains has "Net.WebClient" or CommandLine|contains has "IEX") and (CommandLine|contains has "http://" or CommandLine|contains has "https://" or CommandLine|contains has "\\\\")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Native API Function Calls
properties.description: Detects potentially malicious native API function calls often used by malware
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "NtCreateSection" or CommandLine|contains has "NtMapViewOfSection" or CommandLine|contains has "NtUnmapViewOfSection" or CommandLine|contains has "NtAllocateVirtualMemory" or CommandLine|contains has "NtProtectVirtualMemory" or CommandLine|contains has "NtWriteVirtualMemory" or CommandLine|contains has "NtReadVirtualMemory" or CommandLine|contains has "NtCreateThreadEx" or CommandLine|contains has "NtResumeThread" or CommandLine|contains has "NtSuspendThread" or CommandLine|contains has "NtTerminateProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "NtOpenProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "LdrLoadDll" or CommandLine|contains has "RtlCreateUserThread") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "[DllImport("ntdll")]" or CommandLine|contains has "VirtualAlloc" or CommandLine|contains has "VirtualProtect" or CommandLine|contains has "CreateRemoteThread" or CommandLine|contains has "WriteProcessMemory" or CommandLine|contains has "ReadProcessMemory" or CommandLine|contains has "OpenProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "GetProcAddress" or CommandLine|contains has "LoadLibrary")

properties.displayName: PowerShell Encoded Command Execution
properties.description: Detects PowerShell command lines that contain base64-encoded commands, which adversaries often use to obfuscate malicious scripts or payloads.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "-encodedCommand" or CommandLine|contains has "-enc " or CommandLine|contains has "/e ")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Suspicious WMIC Usage for Remote Process Execution')]

properties.displayName: Suspicious WMIC Usage for Remote Process Execution
properties.description: Detects suspicious use of wmic.exe to spawn processes (e.g., cmd.exe/powershell.exe) locally or on remote hosts using 'process call create'.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ParentImage endswith "\wmic.exe" and Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "process call create" or CommandLine|contains has "/node:" or CommandLine|contains has "/user:") and (CommandLine|contains has "cmd.exe /c" or CommandLine|contains has "powershell.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "pwsh.exe")

properties.displayName: PowerShell Download and Execute Patterns
properties.description: Detects PowerShell commands that download and execute files or scripts
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "DownloadString" or Message|contains has "DownloadFile" or Message|contains has "Invoke-WebRequest" or Message|contains has "iwr" or Message|contains has "wget" or Message|contains has "curl" or Message|contains has "WebClient" or Message|contains has "Net.WebClient" or Message|contains has "Start-BitsTransfer") and (Message|contains has "Invoke-Expression" or Message|contains has "iex" or Message|contains has "Invoke-Command" or Message|contains has "icm" or Message|contains has "Start-Process" or Message|contains has "saps" or Message|contains has "&" or Message|contains has "cmd /c" or Message|contains has "powershell -c") and (Message|contains has "FromBase64String" or Message|contains has "EncodedCommand" or Message|contains has "Reflection.Assembly" or Message|contains has "Load" or Message|contains has "GetType" or Message|contains has "GetMethod" or Message|contains has "Invoke") and (Message|contains has "raw.githubusercontent" or Message|contains has "pastebin.com" or Message|contains has "hastebin" or Message|contains has "ghostbin" or Message|contains has "bit.ly" or Message|contains has "tinyurl" or Message|contains has ".tk" or Message|contains has ".ml" or Message|contains has ".ga" or Message|contains has ".cf")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Native API function names observed in scripts or commandlines')]

properties.displayName: Native API function names observed in scripts or commandlines
properties.description: Detect references to common native NT API function names (Nt*/Zw* like NtQueryInformationProcess, ZwCreateThread) inside script blocks, commandlines, or process creation events indicating direct native API usage.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "ZwQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "NtOpenProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "ZwOpenProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "NtCreateThread" or CommandLine|contains has "ZwCreateThread") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "ZwQueryInformationProcess" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "NtOpenProcess" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "ZwOpenProcess")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Execution of wmiexec
properties.description: Detects potential malicious usage of wmiexec, a tool often employed by adversaries for lateral movement and remote command execution. The rule looks for process creation events where the CommandLine field contains "wmiexec". Legitimate administrative use may trigger this, so further investigation is recommended.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "wmiexec")

properties.displayName: PowerShell Add-Type and DllImport usage
properties.description: Detect PowerShell using Add-Type / DllImport / System.Runtime.InteropServices to import native DLLs (ntdll/kernel32). This is commonly used to call native APIs from scripts.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Add-Type" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "[DllImport" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "System.Runtime.InteropServices" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "DllImport(" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "kernel32.dll" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "ntdll.dll")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Suspicious Command Shell Activity Encoded or Obfuscated Commands')]

properties.displayName: Suspicious Command Shell Activity Encoded or Obfuscated Commands
properties.description: Detects suspicious use of cmd.exe executing encoded or obfuscated commands often used by attackers to evade detection.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/c" or CommandLine|contains has "&&" or CommandLine|contains has "||" or CommandLine|contains has "^" or CommandLine|contains has "%" or CommandLine|contains has "set " or CommandLine|contains has "for " or CommandLine|contains has "call " or CommandLine|contains has "powershell" or CommandLine|contains has "certutil" or CommandLine|contains has "bitsadmin" or CommandLine|contains has "whoami")

properties.displayName: WMI Win32_ProcessCreate Executed Remotely WMI-Activity
properties.description: Flags remote WMI method execution of Win32_Process.Create via WMI-Activity Operational log (commonly used for lateral movement).
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains|all has "Win32_Process.Create" or Message|contains|all has "Execute Method") and (Message|contains has "ClientMachine=localhost" or Message|contains has "ClientMachine=127.0.0.1")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Suspicious Process Injection into LSASS or Explorer')]

properties.displayName: Suspicious Process Injection into LSASS or Explorer
properties.description: Detects process injection behavior either via Sysmon (CreateRemoteThread, ProcessAccess) or Windows Security logs when sensitive processes like lsass.exe or explorer.exe are accessed in a privileged manner.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (EventID == "8" or EventID == "10") and (TargetImage|endswith has "\lsass.exe" or TargetImage|endswith has "\explorer.exe") and (EventID == "4673" or EventID == "4674") and (Message|contains has "lsass.exe" or Message|contains has "explorer.exe")

properties.displayName: Process Injection Techniques
properties.description: Detects potential process injection activity on Windows systems by monitoring Sysmon events including process access (EventID 10) with suspicious granted access rights and remote thread creation events (EventID 8).
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where GrantedAccess matches regex "(?i)0x1F0FFF|0x1fffff|0x1410|0x143a"

properties.displayName: CMD Launched From Suspicious Parent Process
properties.description: Detects when cmd.exe is launched from a suspicious or uncommon parent process (e.g., Office apps, browsers, or script hosts), which can indicate malicious code execution.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (ParentImage|endswith has "\winword.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\excel.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\outlook.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\wscript.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\cscript.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\mshta.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\iexplore.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\chrome.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\firefox.exe")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Sudo Command Usage
properties.description: Detects suspicious sudo command usage from syslog events, where unusual or abnormal sudo commands (indicated by the presence of 'sudo:' and 'COMMAND=') may indicate unauthorized privilege escalation attempts.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "sudo:" or Message|contains has "COMMAND=")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Domain Token Theft or Impersonation
properties.description: Detects behavior that may indicate the theft or impersonation of domain tokens on a Windows system. This rule focuses on Sysmon events that capture process access operations (Event ID 10) and remote thread creation (Event ID 8) against high-value processes like LSASS or Winlogon,  which are common targets for credential or token theft.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (TargetImage|endswith has "\lsass.exe" or TargetImage|endswith has "\winlogon.exe" or TargetImage|endswith has "\spoolsv.exe") and GrantedAccess matches regex "(?i)0x1F0FFF|0x1fffff|0x143a|0x1410" and (TargetImage|endswith has "\lsass.exe" or TargetImage|endswith has "\winlogon.exe" or TargetImage|endswith has "\spoolsv.exe")

properties.displayName: Service Creation Using a Named Pipe
properties.description: Detects the creation of a Windows service (Event ID 7045) referencing a named pipe path in the service file name (e.g., \\.\pipe\...). Attackers sometimes abuse named pipes when creating malicious services for lateral movement or privilege escalation.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ServiceFileName contains "\\.\pipe\"

properties.displayName: Privilege Escalation Attempts
properties.description: Detects potential privilege escalation attempts by monitoring syslog events for failed sudo authentications, messages indicating a user is not in the sudoers file, or failed su attempts.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "sudo:" or Message|contains has "authentication failure") and (Message|contains has "sudo:" or Message|contains has "not in the sudoers file") and (Message|contains has "su:" or Message|contains has "FAILED")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Service Stop via scexe net Stop-Service or WMIC')]

properties.displayName: Service Stop via scexe net Stop-Service or WMIC
properties.description: Detect attempts to stop Windows services using sc.exe stop, net stop, PowerShell Stop-Service, or WMIC service calls.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\sc.exe" and (CommandLine|contains|all has " stop ") and Image endswith "\net.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " net stop " or CommandLine|contains has " net  stop " or CommandLine|contains has " net  stop") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Stop-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "Set-Service -Status Stopped") and Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "service" or CommandLine|contains has "call stopservice" or CommandLine|contains has " where ")

properties.displayName: Browser Automation Tools for Click Fraud
properties.description: Detects browser automation tools commonly used for click fraud
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\chromedriver.exe" or Image|endswith has "\geckodriver.exe" or Image|endswith has "\selenium-server.exe" or Image|endswith has "\phantom.exe" or Image|endswith has "\phantomjs.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "--headless" or CommandLine|contains has "--no-sandbox" or CommandLine|contains has "--disable-gpu" or CommandLine|contains has "--remote-debugging" or CommandLine|contains has "--user-data-dir") and (Image|endswith has "\python.exe" or Image|endswith has "\node.exe" or Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "selenium" or CommandLine|contains has "webdriver" or CommandLine|contains has "puppeteer" or CommandLine|contains has "playwright" or CommandLine|contains has "autoclick" or CommandLine|contains has "clickbot" or CommandLine|contains has "adclick") and (Image|endswith has "\chrome.exe" or Image|endswith has "\firefox.exe" or Image|endswith has "\msedge.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled" or CommandLine|contains has "--disable-web-security" or CommandLine|contains has "--allow-running-insecure-content" or CommandLine|contains has "--disable-features=VizDisplayCompositor" or CommandLine|contains has "--remote-debugging-port" or CommandLine|contains has "--enable-automation") and (TargetFilename|endswith has ".py" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".js" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".ps1" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".vbs") and (TargetFilename|contains has "click" or TargetFilename|contains has "auto" or TargetFilename|contains has "bot" or TargetFilename|contains has "farm" or TargetFilename|contains has "ad")

properties.displayName: Security Service Termination
properties.description: Detects attempts to stop or disable security-related services
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\sc.exe" or Image|endswith has "\net.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "stop" or CommandLine|contains has "delete" or CommandLine|contains has "config" or CommandLine|contains has "disable") and (CommandLine|contains has "WinDefend" or CommandLine|contains has "MsMpSvc" or CommandLine|contains has "WdNisSvc" or CommandLine|contains has "Sense" or CommandLine|contains has "SamSs" or CommandLine|contains has "LanmanServer" or CommandLine|contains has "EventLog" or CommandLine|contains has "Winmgmt" or CommandLine|contains has "BITS" or CommandLine|contains has "wuauserv" or CommandLine|contains has "CryptSvc" or CommandLine|contains has "VSS" or CommandLine|contains has "swprv" or CommandLine|contains has "Fax" or CommandLine|contains has "TermService") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Stop-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "Set-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "Remove-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "Disable-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-Service | Stop")

properties.displayName: Click Fraud and Automated Clicking Detection
properties.description: Detects automated clicking patterns and click fraud activities
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where method == "GET" and (uri|contains has "click" or uri|contains has "ad" or uri|contains has "banner" or uri|contains has "impression" or uri|contains has "cpc" or uri|contains has "cpm" or uri|contains has "adsense" or uri|contains has "doubleclick") and (user_agent|contains has "bot" or user_agent|contains has "crawler" or user_agent|contains has "spider" or user_agent|contains has "automated" or user_agent|contains has "phantom" or user_agent|contains has "selenium" or user_agent|contains has "headless" or user_agent|contains has "chrome/99" or user_agent|contains has "firefox/99") and (referrer|contains has "google.com/search?q=click" or referrer|contains has "bing.com/search?q=click" or referrer|contains has "clickfarm" or referrer|contains has "autoclick" or referrer|contains has "botclick") and src_ip == "*"

properties.displayName: New User Account Created
properties.description: Detects creation of new local or domain user accounts using Windows Security Event ID 4720.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)

properties.displayName: Abnormal Kernel Module Loading
properties.description: Detects potential abnormal kernel module loading on Linux systems by monitoring syslog messages for module load commands (e.g., insmod, modprobe) executed from non-standard directories such as /tmp/.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "insmod" or Message|contains has "modprobe") and Message contains "/tmp/"

properties.displayName: DLL Loaded from Non-standard Directory
properties.description: Detects DLL image load operations from suspicious directories like user folders, temp paths, or network shares. Based on Sysmon Event ID 7.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ImageLoaded|startswith has "C:\Users\" or ImageLoaded|startswith has "C:\Windows\Temp\") and (ImageLoaded|contains has "\\")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Executable or Script Dropped in Persistence Path')]

properties.displayName: Executable or Script Dropped in Persistence Path
properties.description: Detects creation of executables or script files in suspicious persistence paths like AppData or Startup folders using Sysmon Event ID 11.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (TargetFilename|contains has "\AppData\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\") and (TargetFilename|endswith has ".exe" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".bat" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".ps1" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".vbs")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Driver Installations or Modifications
properties.description: Detects the creation or modification of driver services (EventID 7045) where the service file (driver) ends with .sys and is installed outside of known trusted directories.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ServiceFileName endswith ".sys" and ServiceFileName startswith "C:\Windows\System32\drivers\"

properties.displayName: Unauthorized Cron Job Creation
properties.description: Detects syslog events indicating new or modified cron jobs by monitoring for messages such as 'crontab: installing new crontab' or 'crontab: installing for', which may signal unauthorized cron job creation.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "crontab: installing new crontab" or Message|contains has "crontab: installing for")

properties.displayName: Suspicious Service Creation
properties.description: Detects creation of new services which may indicate attacker persistence. Uses Windows System Event ID 7045 and correlated process creation from Sysmon.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "sc create" or CommandLine|contains has "New-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "srvany.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "powershell" or CommandLine|contains has "service")

properties.displayName: Abnormal User Account Modifications
properties.description: Detects abnormal modifications to user accounts, such as creation, modification, or deletion, that may indicate unauthorized account manipulation.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "useradd" or Message|contains has "usermod" or Message|contains has "userdel" or Message|contains has "groupadd" or Message|contains has "groupdel" or Message|contains has "passwd: password changed")

properties.displayName: User Added to Domain Admins Group
properties.description: Detects unauthorized or suspicious additions to the Domain Admins group using Windows Security Event ID 4728 and correlates with suspicious process activity via Sysmon Event ID 1.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where GroupName endswith "Domain Admins" and (CommandLine|contains has "net group" or CommandLine|contains has "Domain Admins" or CommandLine|contains has "/add" or CommandLine|contains has "Add-ADGroupMember" or CommandLine|contains has "dsadd")

properties.displayName: Malicious Scheduled Task Creation
properties.description: Detects suspicious creation or modification of scheduled tasks (EventID 4698) that may be used for persistence or malicious code execution.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Suspicious native module load from non-standard path')]

properties.displayName: Suspicious native module load from non-standard path
properties.description: Detect processes loading native modules (DLLs) from unexpected or user-writable locations (AppData, Temp, user profile paths) which may indicate custom native API usage or dropped native helpers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\rundll32.exe" or Image|endswith has "\svchost.exe" or Image|endswith has "\explorer.exe") and (TargetFilename|contains has "\AppData\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Local\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Users\")

properties.displayName: Scheduled Task Creation
properties.description: Detects new scheduled tasks which may indicate attacker persistence. Uses Windows Security Event ID 4698 and correlates with Sysmon Event ID 1 for related tooling.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "schtasks" or CommandLine|contains has "New-ScheduledTask" or CommandLine|contains has "at.exe")

properties.displayName: Lateral Movement Activity Analysis
properties.description: Detects potential lateral movement by identifying unexpected internal connections using protocols such as RDP, SMB, SSH, and WinRM. This rule uses Zeek conn logs to analyze host-to-host activity across the internal network.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (service|contains has "smb" or service|contains has "rdp" or service|contains has "ssh" or service|contains has "winrm") and id_orig_h startswith "192.168." and id_resp_h startswith "192.168."

properties.displayName: Suspicious Use of ADMIN Administrative Share
properties.description: Detects potential malicious use of the ADMIN$ share. Although ADMIN$ is a legitimate administrative share, adversaries may abuse it during lateral movement to remotely access systems. This rule searches for process creation events where the command line or related fields reference "ADMIN$".
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where CommandLine contains "ADMIN$"

properties.displayName: Abuse of Remote Administration Tools
properties.description: Detects potential abuse of remote administration tools (e.g., psexec, winrs, wmic, wmiexec) from process creation events that may indicate lateral movement or unauthorized remote access attempts.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "psexec" or CommandLine|contains has "winrs" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic /node:" or CommandLine|contains has "wmiexec")

properties.displayName: Potential Meterpreter Execution Detected
properties.description: Detects potential Meterpreter activity by searching for the string "meterpreter" in process creation events. Meterpreter is a payload commonly used in penetration testing frameworks (e.g., Metasploit) and may indicate unauthorized remote control activity.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "meterpreter")

properties.displayName: Abnormal Host-to-Host Communication Patterns
properties.description: Detects abnormal internal host-to-host communication using Zeek conn logs, such as previously unseen IP pairs, unexpected protocols, or new lateral connections that may indicate reconnaissance or lateral movement.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where id.orig_h startswith "192.168." and id.resp_h startswith "192.168." and (service|contains has "rdp" or service|contains has "winrm" or service|contains has "dcerpc" or service|contains has "msrpc")

properties.displayName: Mimikatz LSASS Memory Access or Execution
properties.description: Detects access to lsass.exe memory or usage of common Mimikatz commands like sekurlsa or logonpasswords.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (EventID == "1" or EventID == "10") and TargetImage endswith "\lsass.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "sekurlsa" or CommandLine|contains has "logonpasswords")

properties.displayName: Repeated Failed Login Attempts
properties.description: Detects repeated failed SSH login attempts by monitoring syslog events containing 'Failed password for', aggregated over a short timeframe to indicate brute force activity.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "Failed password for")

properties.displayName: Multiple Account Lockouts Detected
properties.description: Detects repeated user account lockouts which may suggest password spraying or brute force attacks. Uses Windows Security Event ID 4740.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)

properties.displayName: SSH Brute-Force Attack Detection
properties.description: Detects brute force SSH login attempts by monitoring syslog events for failed authentication attempts indicated by 'Failed password for' messages.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "Failed password for")

properties.displayName: Pass_the_Hash
properties.description: Detects potential pass-the-hash attack by identifying network logon events using NTLM authentication in Windows Security EventID 4624 with LogonType 3.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where AuthenticationPackageName == "NTLM"

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Cloud Account Credential Use from Unregistered or Inactive Devices')]

properties.displayName: Cloud Account Credential Use from Unregistered or Inactive Devices
properties.description: Detects successful logins using valid cloud credentials from unregistered, unmanaged, or inactive devices — potentially indicating credential theft or reuse.
properties.query:
AWSCloudTrail
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where eventName == "ConsoleLogin" and additionalEventData.MFAUsed == "No" and userIdentity.type == "IAMUser" and (sourceIPAddress has "10.*" or sourceIPAddress has "192.168.*")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Suspicious Cloud Account Logins from New Geolocations')]

properties.displayName: Suspicious Cloud Account Logins from New Geolocations
properties.description: Detects cloud logins from unusual geolocations or impossible travel patterns, possibly indicating stolen credentials or compromised cloud accounts.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Location has "*") and (Location has "United States" or Location has "Canada")

properties.displayName: Brute-Force SSH Attempts
properties.description: Detects repeated failed SSH login attempts using Zeek logs by identifying high volumes of connection attempts with 'failed' authentication results from a single source.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where auth_success == "F"

properties.displayName: Abnormal TLSSSL Certificate Anomalies
properties.description: Detects suspicious TLS/SSL certificate characteristics from Zeek logs such as self-signed certs, mismatched subject/issuer, or uncommon issuers—potential indicators of malware C2, unauthorized services, or MitM attacks.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where validation_status == "self signed certificate" and (issuer|contains has "CN=localhost" or issuer|contains has "CN=example" or issuer|contains has "CN=fake") and subject startswith "CN=" and issuer startswith "CN=" and subject contains "test"

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Unauthorized Package Manager Activity on Networking Equipment')]

properties.displayName: Unauthorized Package Manager Activity on Networking Equipment
properties.description: Detects unauthorized package manager activity on networking equipment by monitoring syslog events for commands like 'install add file', 'install activate', 'upgrade file', or 'software install' that may indicate unsanctioned software or firmware changes.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "install add file" or Message|contains has "install activate" or Message|contains has "upgrade file" or Message|contains has "software install")

properties.displayName: Unusual File Transfer Activity
properties.description: Detects unusual file transfer activity using Zeek logs, such as large file sizes, executable/script MIME types, or transfers over unexpected protocols like FTP or HTTP instead of secure channels.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (mime_type|contains has "application/x-dosexec" or mime_type|contains has "application/x-sh" or mime_type|contains has "application/x-executable" or mime_type|contains has "application/x-msdownload") and tx_hosts contains "ftp"

properties.displayName: Large Volume of HTTP POST Traffic
properties.description: Detects hosts generating an unusually high number of HTTP POST requests, which may indicate data exfiltration, beaconing, or abuse of web services for command and control.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where method == "POST"

properties.displayName: Tasklist Process Enumeration
properties.description: Detects cmd-based process discovery using tasklist with common enumeration flags (e.g., /v, /svc, /fo, /m).
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\tasklist.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "tasklist" or CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /v" or CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /svc" or CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /fo" or CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /m")

properties.displayName: PowerShell Get-Date or Get-TimeZone usage
properties.description: Detects PowerShell usage that queries system time, timezone, or UTC time (Get-Date, Get-TimeZone, Get-Culture) which may be used for time discovery or time-based evasion.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Date" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-TimeZone" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Culture" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Uptime" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Date -UFormat") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Date" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-TimeZone")

properties.displayName: Cmd_dir_and_where_recursive
properties.description: Detect Windows cmd.exe or where.exe usage with recursive file/directory enumeration flags (e.g., dir /s, where /r) often used for wide file discovery.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has " dir /s" or CommandLine|contains has " dir /b /s" or CommandLine|contains has " dir /s /b" or CommandLine|contains has " dir /a /s") and (Image|endswith has "\where.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "where /r" or CommandLine|contains has "where /R")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'System Information Discovery - ipconfig  hostname  net config executions')]

properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - ipconfig  hostname  net config executions
properties.description: Detect execution of common network/host discovery commands such as ipconfig, hostname or net config which can be used to enumerate host and network configuration.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "ipconfig" or CommandLine|contains has "ipconfig /all" or CommandLine|contains has "hostname" or CommandLine|contains has "net config" or CommandLine|contains has "net view") and (Image|endswith has "\ipconfig.exe" or Image|endswith has "\hostname.exe" or Image|endswith has "\net.exe")

properties.displayName: WebDAV_PROPFIND_Directory_Enumeration_Zeek
properties.description: Detect WebDAV/HTTP directory enumeration via PROPFIND requests and directory traversal-like URIs (Depth header, PROPFIND method) observed in Zeek/HTTP logs indicating remote directory discovery.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (zeek.http.method|contains has "PROPFIND") and (zeek.http.headers|contains has "Depth: 1" or zeek.http.headers|contains has "Depth: infinity") and (zeek.http.uri|matches has "^/.*(/|%2F).*")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'File and Directory Discovery Commands dir s where r Get-ChildItem -Recurse')]

properties.displayName: File and Directory Discovery Commands dir s where r Get-ChildItem -Recurse
properties.description: Detect enumeration of files/folders using recursive or wide-scope discovery commands that adversaries use to locate data of interest.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " dir " or CommandLine|contains has " dir /s" or CommandLine|contains has " dir /b") and (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\where.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "where /r ") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "gci -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Path")

properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - systeminfoexe Execution
properties.description: Detect execution of systeminfo.exe which is often used by attackers to enumerate OS and patch-level information.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\systeminfo.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "systeminfo")

properties.displayName: Suspicious File and Directory Search Commands
properties.description: Detects suspicious file and directory enumeration commands often used by attackers
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\dir.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "dir /s" or CommandLine|contains has "dir /a" or CommandLine|contains has "dir /b" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.txt" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.doc" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.pdf" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.xls" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.ppt" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *password*" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *config*" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *secret*" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *backup*") and Image endswith "\where.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "where /r" or CommandLine|contains has "where *.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "where *.bat" or CommandLine|contains has "where *.ps1") and (Image|endswith has "\findstr.exe" or Image|endswith has "\find.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "/s" or CommandLine|contains has "/i password" or CommandLine|contains has "/i admin" or CommandLine|contains has "/i login" or CommandLine|contains has "/i secret" or CommandLine|contains has "/i key") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "gci -r" or CommandLine|contains has "ls -r" or CommandLine|contains has "dir -r" or CommandLine|contains has "Select-String" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-Content | Select-String") and (CommandLine|contains has "C:\Users" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Windows\System32" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Program Files" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\ProgramData" or CommandLine|contains has "%USERPROFILE%" or CommandLine|contains has "%APPDATA%")

properties.displayName: Find_and_ls_recursive_unix_syslog
properties.description: Detect Unix/Linux file and directory discovery via auditd/syslog commands such as find / -type f, ls -R, tree or recursive locate usage recorded in syslog/audit.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "find / -type f" or Message|contains has "find / -name" or Message|contains has "find . -type f -name") and (Message|contains has "ls -R" or Message|contains has "ls -laR" or Message|contains has "tree ") and (Message|contains has "updatedb" or Message|contains has "locate ")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'System Information Discovery - reg query for ComputerName  Hardware info')]

properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - reg query for ComputerName  Hardware info
properties.description: Detect use of 'reg query' targeting keys often used to gather system identity and hardware info (ComputerName, SystemBiosVersion, etc.). Attackers sometimes use reg query to collect host metadata.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\reg.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\ComputerName" or CommandLine|contains has "HKLM\HARDWARE\DESCRIPTION\System" or CommandLine|contains has "HKLM\HARDWARE\DESCRIPTION\System\BIOS" or CommandLine|contains has "ComputerName")

properties.displayName: WMI Activity - Win32_Process Query
properties.description: Detects WMI queries against Win32_Process in the WMI-Activity Operational log (remote or local process discovery).
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Query|contains has "Select * from Win32_Process" or Query|contains has "select Name,ProcessId from Win32_Process") and Consumer contains "Win32_Process"

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'timedatectl hwclock or chronyc usage on Linux')]

properties.displayName: timedatectl hwclock or chronyc usage on Linux
properties.description: Detects Linux commands that query or set system time and NTP clients (timedatectl, hwclock, chronyc, ntpq) recorded in syslog or audit logs indicating system time discovery or manipulation.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "timedatectl" or Message|contains has "timedatectl status") and (Message|contains has "hwclock" or Message|contains has "hwclock --show") and (Message|contains has "chronyc" or Message|contains has "ntpq" or Message|contains has "chronyc tracking")

properties.displayName: Linux pstop or proc Enumeration syslogaudit
properties.description: Detects process discovery on Linux via ps, top in batch mode, pgrep, or reading /proc to list running processes as seen in syslog/audit logs.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has " ps -ef" or Message|contains has " ps aux" or Message|contains has " ps -eo") and (Message|contains has " top -b" or Message|contains has " top -n ") and (Message|contains has "/proc/*/cmdline" or Message|contains has "/proc/*/status" or Message|contains has "pgrep ")

properties.displayName: PowerShell Get-Process or WMICIM Win32_Process Discovery
properties.description: Detects PowerShell-based process discovery via Get-Process, Get-WmiObject Win32_Process, or Get-CimInstance Win32_Process.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Process" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-CimInstance" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_Process") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Process" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process")

properties.displayName: w32tm query or status checks
properties.description: Detects w32tm queries and status commands used to inspect Windows time service configuration and synchronization state.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\w32tm.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/query" or CommandLine|contains has "/status" or CommandLine|contains has "/stripchart") and Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "w32tm /query")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'System Information Discovery via whoami and hostname')]

properties.displayName: System Information Discovery via whoami and hostname
properties.description: Detects system information discovery attempts using whoami, hostname, and similar commands
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\whoami.exe" or Image|endswith has "\hostname.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "whoami" or CommandLine|contains has "hostname" or CommandLine|contains has "/all" or CommandLine|contains has "/groups" or CommandLine|contains has "/priv") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "$env:username" or CommandLine|contains has "$env:computername" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_ComputerSystem" or CommandLine|contains has "[Environment]::UserName" or CommandLine|contains has "[Environment]::MachineName")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'System Information Discovery - WMIC Queries for OS and BIOS')]

properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - WMIC Queries for OS and BIOS
properties.description: Detect WMIC usage that queries OS, BIOS, or computer system information (e.g., wmic os get / wmic bios get / wmic computersystem). WMIC is commonly used by attackers for host enumeration.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "wmic os get" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic bios get" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic computersystem get" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic csproduct get")

properties.displayName: Advanced Process Enumeration and Discovery
properties.description: Detects advanced process enumeration techniques beyond basic tasklist
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "process list" or CommandLine|contains has "process get" or CommandLine|contains has "process where" or CommandLine|contains has "process call") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Process" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "gwmi Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "gcim Win32_Process" or CommandLine|contains has "ps") and (CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /svc" or CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /m" or CommandLine|contains has "tasklist /v" or CommandLine|contains has "query process" or CommandLine|contains has "qprocess") and (CommandLine|contains has "findstr /i antivirus" or CommandLine|contains has "findstr /i defender" or CommandLine|contains has "findstr /i security" or CommandLine|contains has "findstr /i firewall" or CommandLine|contains has "findstr /i monitoring" or CommandLine|contains has "Where-Object.*antivirus" or CommandLine|contains has "Where-Object.*defender" or CommandLine|contains has "Where-Object.*security" or CommandLine|contains has "where.*av")

properties.displayName: System Time and Timezone Discovery Commands
properties.description: Detects commands used to discover system time, timezone, and date information
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\time.exe" or Image|endswith has "\date.exe" or Image|endswith has "\tzutil.exe" or Image|endswith has "\w32tm.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "time /t" or CommandLine|contains has "date /t" or CommandLine|contains has "tzutil /g" or CommandLine|contains has "tzutil /l" or CommandLine|contains has "w32tm /query" or CommandLine|contains has "w32tm /stripchart") and Image endswith "\net.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "net time" or CommandLine|contains has "net view") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Date" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-TimeZone" or CommandLine|contains has "[DateTime]::Now" or CommandLine|contains has "[DateTime]::UtcNow" or CommandLine|contains has "[TimeZone]::CurrentTimeZone" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_TimeZone" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_LocalTime" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-CimInstance Win32_TimeZone") and Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "wmic timezone" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic os get localdatetime" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic os get lastbootuptime")

properties.displayName: tzutil query timezone
properties.description: Detects use of tzutil to query or set the system timezone which may indicate system time discovery or manipulation.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\tzutil.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " /g" or CommandLine|contains has " /s " or CommandLine|contains has " /l")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'System Information Discovery - PowerShell Get-CimInstance  Get-WmiObject  Get-ComputerInfo')]

properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - PowerShell Get-CimInstance  Get-WmiObject  Get-ComputerInfo
properties.description: Detect PowerShell commands invoking Get-CimInstance, Get-WmiObject, Get-ComputerInfo or common WMI/Win32 class queries used to enumerate system information.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-CimInstance" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-ComputerInfo" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_OperatingSystem" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_ComputerSystem" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Win32_BIOS") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-CimInstance" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-ComputerInfo")

properties.displayName: Suspicious_File_Enumeration_Tools
properties.description: Detect execution of common file-enumeration or bulk-copying utilities and commands that indicate broad file/directory discovery (robocopy, xcopy, tree, dirb/dirsearch) across Windows and Unix telemetry.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "robocopy" or CommandLine|contains has "xcopy " or CommandLine|contains has "tree " or CommandLine|contains has "dir /s") and (CommandLine|contains has "dirb " or CommandLine|contains has "dirsearch" or CommandLine|contains has "find " or CommandLine|contains has "rsync -av")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'System Time Discovery via tzutil w32tm datetime or Get-Date')]

properties.displayName: System Time Discovery via tzutil w32tm datetime or Get-Date
properties.description: Detect commands that query local system time or timezone, often used prior to time-based evasion or scheduling.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\tzutil.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " /g" or CommandLine|contains has " /s ") and Image endswith "\w32tm.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/query" or CommandLine|contains has "/status" or CommandLine|contains has "/configuration") and Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " time /t" or CommandLine|contains has " date /t") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Date")

properties.displayName: WMIC Process List or Get
properties.description: Detects WMIC usage to enumerate processes (e.g., 'wmic process list', 'wmic process get').
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "wmic process list" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic process get" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic /node:")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Zeek NTP or UDP 123 traffic indicating external time queries')]

properties.displayName: Zeek NTP or UDP 123 traffic indicating external time queries
properties.description: Detects NTP (UDP/123) requests or responses observed in Zeek logs which may indicate a host querying external time sources for time discovery or sync changes.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where zeek.conn.service contains "ntp" and (zeek.udp.dport == "123") and (zeek.udp.sport == "123")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Detect Scanning or IPsec Probing via Public IPs or Port 500')]

properties.displayName: Detect Scanning or IPsec Probing via Public IPs or Port 500
properties.description: Detects external IP scans or use of port 500 (commonly used for ISAKMP/IPsec VPNs), indicating reconnaissance or tunneling attempts.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (src_ip|cidr has "!10.0.0.0/8" or src_ip|cidr has "!192.168.0.0/16" or src_ip|cidr has "!172.16.0.0/12")

properties.displayName: PowerShell_Get-ChildItem_Recurse
properties.description: Detect PowerShell recursive file and directory enumeration (Get-ChildItem -Recurse, gci -Recurse, Get-ChildItem -File) commonly used by attackers to locate sensitive files.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "Get-ChildItem" or ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "-Recurse") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "gci -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Path * -Recurse")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Module loads of debugging libraries from user-writable paths')]

properties.displayName: Module loads of debugging libraries from user-writable paths
properties.description: Detect image/module load events where common debug / debugging helper DLLs (dbghelp.dll, dbgcore.dll, vsjitdebugger.exe components) are loaded from user-writable locations (Temp, AppData, Downloads) — suspicious for evasion or illicit debugging helpers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (TargetFilename|contains has "dbghelp.dll" or TargetFilename|contains has "dbgcore.dll" or TargetFilename|contains has "vsjitdebugger.exe") and (TargetFilename|contains has "\AppData\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Local\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Downloads\")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'PowerShell IsDebuggerPresent or Debug API checks in ScriptBlock')]

properties.displayName: PowerShell IsDebuggerPresent or Debug API checks in ScriptBlock
properties.description: Detect PowerShell scriptblocks that reference common anti-debugging APIs or strings such as IsDebuggerPresent, CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent, OutputDebugString, or CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent. Attackers may call these to detect attached debuggers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "OutputDebugString" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "IsProcessorFeaturePresent")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'CommandLine contains common debugger tool names ollydbg x64dbg windbg')]

properties.displayName: CommandLine contains common debugger tool names ollydbg x64dbg windbg
properties.description: Detect process creations where command line or image indicate execution of common debugger tools or utilities used for reversing/debugging (e.g., ollydbg, x64dbg, windbg, IDA). Useful to identify local debugging or adversary tooling.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "ollydbg" or CommandLine|contains has "x64dbg" or CommandLine|contains has "windbg" or CommandLine|contains has "idaq" or CommandLine|contains has "ida64" or CommandLine|contains has "scylla" or CommandLine|contains has "scylla_x64" or CommandLine|contains has "dbgview") and (Image|endswith has "\ollydbg.exe" or Image|endswith has "\x64dbg.exe" or Image|endswith has "\windbg.exe" or Image|endswith has "\idaq.exe" or Image|endswith has "\ida64.exe")

properties.displayName: Audit Policy Change or Clearing Attempt
properties.description: Detects audit policy changes (Event ID 4719) and correlates with suspicious tools that modify or clear logs (auditpol, secedit, wevtutil).
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "auditpol" or CommandLine|contains has "secedit" or CommandLine|contains has "wevtutil cl")

properties.displayName: Unusual File Access or Modification
properties.description: Detects unusual file access or modification events by monitoring syslog messages for keywords such as 'modified', 'changed', 'deleted', or 'created' in relation to sensitive files or directories (e.g., /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/sudoers, /etc/group, /var/log), which may signal potential indicator removal or tampering.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "/etc/passwd" or Message|contains has "/etc/shadow" or Message|contains has "/etc/sudoers" or Message|contains has "/etc/group" or Message|contains has "/var/log") and (Message|contains has "modified" or Message|contains has "changed" or Message|contains has "deleted" or Message|contains has "created")

properties.displayName: Enabling RDP Through Firewall Modification Detected
properties.description: Detects modification of Windows Firewall rules that enable Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP). This rule looks for events (e.g. EventID 4946) that indicate a firewall rule change where the rule involves port 3389 or mentions "Remote Desktop". This behavior can be indicative of an adversary enabling RDP for remote access.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "3389" or Message|contains has "Remote Desktop")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Long delay in compiled binaries via Sleep or NtDelayExecution')]

properties.displayName: Long delay in compiled binaries via Sleep or NtDelayExecution
properties.description: Detect process creations of binaries whose commandline, scriptblock, or loaded modules contain Sleep calls, NtDelayExecution, or suspicious long-wait logic often used to evade sandbox runtime limits.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "sleep(" or CommandLine|contains has "Sleep(" or CommandLine|contains has "NtDelayExecution" or CommandLine|contains has "NtDelayExecution(") and (TargetFilename|contains has "\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\AppData\")

properties.displayName: Log Tampering or Deletion
properties.description: Detects potential log tampering or deletion on Linux systems by monitoring syslog events for suspicious commands or messages (e.g. 'rm -rf /var/log', 'deleted log', 'truncated log', 'log cleared') that may indicate attempts to remove or obscure log data.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "rm -rf /var/log" or Message|contains has "rm -f /var/log" or Message|contains has "deleted log" or Message|contains has "truncated log" or Message|contains has "log cleared")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'High uptime checks and conditional long delays')]

properties.displayName: High uptime checks and conditional long delays
properties.description: Detect attempts to check system uptime or tick counts and then delay execution for long periods (indicates time-based sandbox evasion logic).
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Uptime" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "LastBootUpTime" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "GetTickCount" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "GetTickCount64") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 600" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 900")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Timeout  choice based long delays in cmdbatch')]

properties.displayName: Timeout  choice based long delays in cmdbatch
properties.description: Detect use of `timeout`, `choice` or other cmd-based delay constructs with long durations frequently used to bypass sandbox time windows.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "timeout /t 60" or CommandLine|contains has "timeout /t 300" or CommandLine|contains has "choice /t 60" or CommandLine|contains has "choice /t 300") and Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "ping -n 60 127.0.0.1" or CommandLine|contains has "ping -n 300 127.0.0.1")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Syscall strings or inline syscall opcodes in scriptblocks')]

properties.displayName: Syscall strings or inline syscall opcodes in scriptblocks
properties.description: Detect occurrences of "syscall" usage strings or inline syscall opcodes in scripts or commandlines (shellcode-like patterns, raw syscall numbers) that indicate attempts to invoke native syscalls directly.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "syscall" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "mov r10" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "mov eax" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "0x")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Zeek HTTP logs - download or user-agent indicative of debugger tools')]

properties.displayName: Zeek HTTP logs - download or user-agent indicative of debugger tools
properties.description: Detect HTTP downloads or user-agents that reference common debugger or reverse-engineering tool names (x64dbg, ollydbg, ida, windbg). Network detection of tooling acquisition can indicate active analysis or adversary tooling movement.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (zeek.http.uri|contains has "x64dbg" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "ollydbg" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "ida" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "idaq" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "windbg" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "scylla") and (zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "x64dbg" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "ollydbg" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "ida") and (zeek.file.name|contains has "x64dbg" or zeek.file.name|contains has "ollydbg" or zeek.file.name|contains has "ida")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Debugger Evasion Indicators in Command Line or ScriptBlock')]

properties.displayName: Debugger Evasion Indicators in Command Line or ScriptBlock
properties.description: Detect common anti-debug techniques including IsDebuggerPresent/CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent strings, anti-debug flags, or tooling checks.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "OutputDebugString") and (CommandLine|contains has "ollydbg" or CommandLine|contains has "x64dbg" or CommandLine|contains has "windbg" or CommandLine|contains has "scylla_hide" or CommandLine|contains has "procmon") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent")

properties.displayName: Anti-Debug API Calls and Techniques
properties.description: Detects anti-debugging techniques and API calls used to evade debugger detection
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "IsDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent" or CommandLine|contains has "NtQueryInformationProcess" or CommandLine|contains has "OutputDebugString" or CommandLine|contains has "GetTickCount" or CommandLine|contains has "QueryPerformanceCounter" or CommandLine|contains has "timeGetTime" or CommandLine|contains has "SetUnhandledExceptionFilter" or CommandLine|contains has "UnhandledExceptionFilter" or CommandLine|contains has "NtSetInformationThread" or CommandLine|contains has "ThreadHideFromDebugger") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Process | Where Name -like "*debug*"" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where Name -like "*debug*"" or CommandLine|contains has "Test-Path "*debug*"" or CommandLine|contains has "[Environment]::TickCount" or CommandLine|contains has "Stopwatch") and (CommandLine|contains has "tasklist | findstr debug" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic process get name | findstr debug" or CommandLine|contains has "query process" or CommandLine|contains has "tlist") and (CommandLine|contains has "windbg" or CommandLine|contains has "x64dbg" or CommandLine|contains has "ollydbg" or CommandLine|contains has "ida" or CommandLine|contains has "ghidra" or CommandLine|contains has "cheat engine" or CommandLine|contains has "processhacker" or CommandLine|contains has "process monitor" or CommandLine|contains has "regmon" or CommandLine|contains has "filemon")

properties.displayName: Start-Sleep long duration in PowerShell
properties.description: Detect PowerShell scriptblocks using Start-Sleep with unusually long durations commonly used to evade sandbox analysis.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 60" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 120" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 300" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 600" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 900") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -s 60" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -s 300")

properties.displayName: Rundll32 Proxy Execution for Defense Evasion
properties.description: Detects rundll32.exe being used to proxy execution of malicious code
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\rundll32.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "javascript:" or CommandLine|contains has "vbscript:" or CommandLine|contains has "mshtml" or CommandLine|contains has "shell32.dll,ShellExec_RunDLL" or CommandLine|contains has "advpack.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "ieframe.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "shdocvw.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "urlmon.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "ieadvpack.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "setupapi.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "ieframe.dll") and (CommandLine|contains has "DllCanUnloadNow" or CommandLine|contains has "DllGetVersion" or CommandLine|contains has "DllInstall" or CommandLine|contains has "DllRegisterServer" or CommandLine|contains has "DllUnregisterServer" or CommandLine|contains has "OpenURL" or CommandLine|contains has "RouteTheCall" or CommandLine|contains has "LaunchApplication") and (CommandLine|contains has "http://" or CommandLine|contains has "https://" or CommandLine|contains has "ftp://" or CommandLine|contains has "\\\\") and (CommandLine|contains has " -e " or CommandLine|contains has " -en " or CommandLine|contains has " -enc " or CommandLine|contains has " -encoded " or CommandLine|contains has "FromBase64String") and (CommandLine|contains has "%TEMP%" or CommandLine|contains has "%TMP%" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Users\*\AppData\Local\Temp" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Windows\Temp")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Time-Based Evasion via Sleep Ping-Delay or Timeout')]

properties.displayName: Time-Based Evasion via Sleep Ping-Delay or Timeout
properties.description: Detect long execution delays often used to evade sandboxes, including Start-Sleep, timeout, and ping loops as timers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep -s" or CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds") and Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "timeout /t " or CommandLine|contains has "choice /t ") and (CommandLine|contains has "ping -n " or CommandLine|contains has "ping -w ") and (CommandLine|contains has "300" or CommandLine|contains has "600" or CommandLine|contains has "900" or CommandLine|contains has "1200")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'ptracesyscall or gdb invocation detected in syslogauditd')]

properties.displayName: ptracesyscall or gdb invocation detected in syslogauditd
properties.description: Detect Linux host events indicating ptrace usage, gdb invocation, or auditd syscall logs for ptrace (possible debugger detection/evasion behavior). Monitors syslog/auditd messages for ptrace/gdb/strace/gcore related activity.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "syscall=101" or Message|contains has "ptrace(" or Message|contains has "PTRACE_ATTACH") and (Message|contains has "gdb" or Message|contains has "gdbserver" or Message|contains has "gcore") and (Message|contains has "strace")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Extended Sleep and Delay Commands for Evasion')]

properties.displayName: Extended Sleep and Delay Commands for Evasion
properties.description: Detects extended sleep, delay, or timeout commands often used for sandbox evasion
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "timeout /t" or CommandLine|contains has "ping -n" or CommandLine|contains has "ping 127.0.0.1 -n" or CommandLine|contains has "ping localhost -n") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "System.Threading.Thread.Sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "[Threading.Thread]::Sleep") and (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\choice.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "choice /t" or CommandLine|contains has "choice /d" or CommandLine|contains has "/t 10" or CommandLine|contains has "/t 30" or CommandLine|contains has "/t 60" or CommandLine|contains has "/n 10" or CommandLine|contains has "/n 30" or CommandLine|contains has "/n 60") and CommandLine matches regex ".*(/t\s+|sleep\s+|Sleep\()\d{2,}.*"

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'Stepped timer loops or exponential backoff used as long delay')]

properties.displayName: Stepped timer loops or exponential backoff used as long delay
properties.description: Detect patterns indicative of scripted stepped waits or exponential backoff loops (incremental sleep/ping loops) used to extend execution time beyond sandbox limits.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "for(" or ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "Start-Sleep" or ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "$i++") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep ($i)" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds $i" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds ($i *")

properties.displayName: Linux curlwgetscprsync downloads in syslog
properties.description: Detect use of curl, wget, scp, sftp or rsync to retrieve files from remote hosts recorded in syslog/audit — common ingress tool transfer on Linux hosts.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "curl -O" or Message|contains has "curl -o" or Message|contains has "wget " or Message|contains has "scp " or Message|contains has "sftp " or Message|contains has "rsync ") and (Message|contains has "/tmp/" or Message|contains has "/var/tmp/" or Message|contains has "/home/" or Message|contains has "/dev/shm/")

properties.displayName: CertUtil download to suspicious path
properties.description: Detects usage of certutil to download files (usually via URL) into user-writable or suspicious directories (e.g., %TEMP%, AppData, Downloads) — common technique for ingress tool transfer on Windows.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\certutil.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "-urlcache" or CommandLine|contains has "-f" or CommandLine|contains has "http://" or CommandLine|contains has "https://") and (TargetFilename|contains has "\AppData\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Local\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Downloads\")

properties.displayName: Unencrypted Traffic on TCP 443
properties.description: Detects network connections to port 443 (typically HTTPS) that do not negotiate TLS/SSL, which may indicate misuse of the port for unencrypted or covert communication.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where proto == "tcp" and service == "-"

properties.displayName: Suspicious Web-based Command and Control Patterns
properties.description: Detects suspicious web-based command and control communication patterns
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (user_agent|contains has "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1)" or user_agent|contains has "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 7.0; Windows NT 5.1)" or user_agent|contains has "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 8.0; Windows NT 5.1)" or user_agent|contains has "python-requests" or user_agent|contains has "python-urllib" or user_agent|contains has "curl" or user_agent|contains has "wget" or user_agent|contains has "PowerShell" or user_agent|contains has "WinHTTP" or user_agent|contains has "") and method == "POST" and request_body_len == ">1024" and (uri|contains has "/admin" or uri|contains has "/panel" or uri|contains has "/gate" or uri|contains has "/log" or uri|contains has "/upload" or uri|contains has "/download" or uri|contains has "/data" or uri|contains has ".php?id=" or uri|contains has ".aspx?id=" or uri|contains has ".jsp?id=") and request_body_len == "<100" and status_code == "200"

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'HTTP file downloads  Zeek detection by URIuser-agentfilename')]

properties.displayName: HTTP file downloads  Zeek detection by URIuser-agentfilename
properties.description: Detect HTTP file downloads (common tool installers, payload names) via Zeek by matching URIs, filenames, or suspicious User-Agent strings often used when retrieving adversary tools.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
