| where (zeek.http.uri|contains has ".exe" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".dll" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".zip" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".tar.gz" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "download" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "installer") and (zeek.file.name|contains has "meterpreter" or zeek.file.name|contains has "cobalt" or zeek.file.name|contains has "beacon" or zeek.file.name|contains has "agent") and (zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "curl" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "Wget" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "python-requests")

properties.displayName: Suspicious HTTP User-Agent Strings
properties.description: Detects suspicious or malicious HTTP User-Agent strings observed in Zeek HTTP logs, which may indicate malware beaconing, automated tools, or penetration testing frameworks.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (user_agent|contains has "curl/" or user_agent|contains has "python-requests" or user_agent|contains has "powershell" or user_agent|contains has "Go-http-client" or user_agent|contains has "wget" or user_agent|contains has "nmap" or user_agent|contains has "sqlmap" or user_agent|contains has "fuzz" or user_agent|contains has "bot")

properties.displayName: Detect FRPC Communication on Designated Ports
properties.description: Detects possible FRPC (Fast Reverse Proxy Client) activity by identifying traffic on high-risk ports (6000, 7000) using Zeek logs.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)

properties.displayName: Many Subdomains Looking Like Exfiltration
properties.description: Detects large volumes of unique subdomain queries to the same root domain, which may indicate DNS-based data exfiltration using tunneling or encoding schemes.
properties.query:
DnsEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where query matches regex "([a-zA-Z0-9]{10,}\.){3,}"

properties.displayName: DNS Tunneling Detection
properties.description: Detects potential DNS tunneling by identifying long or high-frequency DNS queries, especially those using NULL or TXT query types, which are commonly abused for data exfiltration or C2.
properties.query:
DnsEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (qtype_name|contains has "TXT" or qtype_name|contains has "NULL") and query matches regex ".{50,}"

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'DNS Tunneling via High Volume or Suspicious Subdomains')]

properties.displayName: DNS Tunneling via High Volume or Suspicious Subdomains
properties.description: Detects DNS tunneling behavior by identifying high-frequency or unusual DNS queries with long or encoded subdomains. Uses Sysmon Event ID 22.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (QueryName|contains has ".") and (QueryName|endswith has ".com" or QueryName|endswith has ".net" or QueryName|endswith has ".org")

properties.displayName: Detect ICMP-Based FRPC Communication
properties.description: Detects ICMP echo request and reply traffic which may indicate FRPC tunneling behavior for C2 using non-application layer protocols.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (icmp_type == "0" or icmp_type == "8")

properties.displayName: HTTP Beaconing and Suspicious Web Protocols
properties.description: Detects suspicious use of web protocols for C2, data staging, or tooling ingress (unusual HTTP/HTTPS POSTs, uncommon user-agents, periodic beaconing, and HTTP downloads of executables). Covers network (Zeek/Proxy), endpoint (Sysmon NetworkConnect), and web server logs.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "curl" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "Wget" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "python-requests" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "Go-http-client" or zeek.http.user_agent|contains has "libwww-perl") and (zeek.http.uri|contains has "/api/" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "/upload" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "/ws/" or zeek.http.uri|contains has "/update") and zeek.http.method contains "POST" and (zeek.http.uri|matches has "^/.{1,50}$") and (zeek.http.uri|contains has ".exe" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".dll" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".zip" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".ps1" or zeek.http.uri|contains has ".jar") and (DestinationPort == "80" or DestinationPort == "443") and (ParentImage|not_endswith has "\chrome.exe" or ParentImage|not_endswith has "\firefox.exe" or ParentImage|not_endswith has "\msedge.exe" or ParentImage|not_endswith has "\iexplore.exe") and (Image|not_endswith has "\pwsh.exe" or Image|not_endswith has "\powershell.exe") and http.method == "POST" and (http.user_agent|contains has "python-requests" or http.user_agent|contains has "curl") and (http.content_type|contains has "application/octet-stream" or http.content_type|contains has "application/x-msdownload") and zeek.http.uri contains "/api/"

properties.displayName: Unusual Process Making Network Connection
properties.description: Detects outbound network activity from suspicious or abused processes like powershell.exe, regsvr32.exe, rundll32.exe, or mshta.exe using Sysmon Event ID 3.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\regsvr32.exe" or Image|endswith has "\mshta.exe" or Image|endswith has "\rundll32.exe")

properties.displayName: PowerShell BITSJob or Invoke-WebRequest file downloads
properties.description: Detect PowerShell using BITS (Start-BitsTransfer / BITSJob) or Invoke-WebRequest/Invoke-RestMethod to download executables or archives into user-writable paths — often used for ingress tool transfer.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-BitsTransfer" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Add-BitsFile" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Complete-BitsTransfer") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Invoke-WebRequest" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Invoke-RestMethod" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "-OutFile") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "-OutFile" or CommandLine|contains has ".exe" or CommandLine|contains has ".zip" or CommandLine|contains has ".ps1")

resources.name: [concat(parameters('workspaceName'), '/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/', 'FTP or anonymous file transfer indicators ftp ftps smb file transfer')]

properties.displayName: FTP or anonymous file transfer indicators ftp ftps smb file transfer
properties.description: Detect FTP activity, SMB file copy events, or anonymous uploads/downloads that indicate tools being brought into the environment via legacy protocols (ftp/ftps, smb put/get).
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (zeek.smb.command|contains has "NT_CREATE_ANDX" or zeek.smb.command|contains has "SMB_COM_WRITE") and (zeek.ftp.request|contains has "STOR" or zeek.ftp.request|contains has "PUT" or zeek.ftp.request|contains has "anonymous")

properties.displayName: Anomalous Network Traffic  C2 Beaconing
properties.description: Detects potential C2 beaconing activity by identifying periodic or anomalous network traffic patterns characterized by small outbound TCP payload sizes, which can indicate command and control communications.
properties.query:
union SecurityEvent, Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Protocol == "tcp" and PayloadSize == "<=150"

properties.displayName: Anomalous Connection Volume and Duration
properties.description: Detects hosts with a high number of connections or abnormally long connection durations using Zeek conn logs. These may indicate beaconing, data exfiltration, or scanning behavior.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where history contains "S"

properties.displayName: Suspicious Download Tools and Methods
properties.description: Detects suspicious file download methods and tools used for ingress tool transfer
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\certutil.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "-urlcache" or CommandLine|contains has "-split" or CommandLine|contains has "-f" or CommandLine|contains has "http") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Invoke-WebRequest" or CommandLine|contains has "iwr" or CommandLine|contains has "wget" or CommandLine|contains has "curl" or CommandLine|contains has "DownloadFile" or CommandLine|contains has "DownloadString" or CommandLine|contains has "WebClient" or CommandLine|contains has "Net.WebClient" or CommandLine|contains has "Start-BitsTransfer") and Image endswith "\bitsadmin.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/transfer" or CommandLine|contains has "/download" or CommandLine|contains has "/addfile") and Image endswith "\hh.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "http" or CommandLine|contains has "https" or CommandLine|contains has ".chm") and Image endswith "\mshta.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "http" or CommandLine|contains has "https" or CommandLine|contains has "javascript" or CommandLine|contains has "vbscript") and (CommandLine|contains has "raw.githubusercontent" or CommandLine|contains has "pastebin.com" or CommandLine|contains has "bit.ly" or CommandLine|contains has "tinyurl" or CommandLine|contains has "shortened" or CommandLine|contains has ".tk" or CommandLine|contains has ".ml" or CommandLine|contains has ".ga" or CommandLine|contains has ".cf")
